overrides.override_summary: Maximum interest rate capped at 10% per annum
overrides.why_it_matters: FA rate of 1.5%/month (18%/year) exceeds CA cap — CA cap applies

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages clauses may be unenforceable under CA Civil Code §1671
overrides.why_it_matters: Substantial liquidated damages provisions in FA may not be enforceable in CA

overrides.override_summary: NC governing law provision may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA franchise laws may govern instead of NC law

overrides.override_summary: NC venue requirement may not be enforceable; CA courts may be proper venue
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee may be able to litigate in CA instead of NC

overrides.override_summary: General release on renewal/transfer may be void under CA Corp Code §31512 and B&P Code §20010
overrides.why_it_matters: Transfer release may not waive CA franchise law claims

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law governs the franchise relationship
overrides.why_it_matters: IL Franchise Disclosure Act applies instead of NC law

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside Illinois is void (except arbitration may be outside IL)
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee can litigate in IL; NC venue clause void

overrides.override_summary: General release does not release claims under Indiana Deceptive Franchise Practices Law
overrides.why_it_matters: IN franchise law claims preserved despite release

overrides.override_summary: NC venue may not be enforceable under Indiana law
overrides.why_it_matters: IN courts may be proper venue

overrides.override_summary: Indiana franchise laws govern all agreements
overrides.why_it_matters: IN law controls over NC choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Release does not apply to claims under MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: MD franchise law claims preserved

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring suit in Maryland for MD franchise law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MD is an alternative venue for MD law claims

overrides.override_summary: Good cause required for termination with 30 days to cure. Termination before expiration only for good cause.
overrides.why_it_matters: Protects against arbitrary termination

overrides.override_summary: Fair market value compensation required on non-renewal if term <5 years and franchisee prohibited from competing
overrides.why_it_matters: May require compensation if franchise not renewed (though ESA term is 20 years)

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside Michigan is void (arbitration exception)
overrides.why_it_matters: MI courts proper venue despite NC clause

overrides.override_summary: 90 days' notice with 60 days to cure required. Good cause required. 180 days' notice for non-renewal.
overrides.why_it_matters: Significantly longer notice and cure periods than FA

overrides.override_summary: Release on transfer does not apply to MN Franchise Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchise law claims preserved

overrides.override_summary: Litigation outside MN and jury trial waiver may be void under MN law
overrides.why_it_matters: MN courts proper venue; jury trial may be preserved

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages and termination penalties subject to scrutiny
overrides.why_it_matters: MN may limit or void liquidated damages

overrides.override_summary: NSF fee capped at $30 per dishonored check under MN Stat §604.113
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits NSF charges

overrides.override_summary: Choice of law not a waiver of rights under NY GBL Article 33
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchise law rights preserved

overrides.override_summary: Release does not apply to ND Franchise Investment Law claims
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchise law claims preserved

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages and termination penalties held unfair, unjust, and inequitable
overrides.why_it_matters: ND may void all liquidated damages provisions

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may bring action in North Dakota
overrides.why_it_matters: ND is alternative venue

overrides.override_summary: Jury trial waiver and exemplary/punitive damages waiver prohibited
overrides.why_it_matters: Jury trial right preserved in ND

overrides.override_summary: Venue and governing law provisions void under RI Franchise Investment Act §19-28.1-14
overrides.why_it_matters: NC venue/law clause unenforceable for RI claims

overrides.override_summary: Cancellation without reasonable cause is unlawful under VA Retail Franchising Act §13.1-564
overrides.why_it_matters: Non-curable termination grounds must constitute 'reasonable cause' under VA law

overrides.override_summary: WA Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails in conflict
overrides.why_it_matters: WA law overrides NC choice of law where applicable

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration/mediation must be in WA or mutually agreed site. Litigation may be brought in WA.
overrides.why_it_matters: NC venue for arbitration overridden

overrides.override_summary: Release may not include rights under WA Franchise Investment Protection Act (except negotiated settlement with independent counsel)
overrides.why_it_matters: WA franchise law claims preserved from release

overrides.override_summary: Noncompete void unless employee earns >$100K/year (adjusted for inflation); independent contractor >$250K/year
overrides.why_it_matters: Although ESA has no noncompete, this would apply if one were added. Also voids no-poach provisions.

overrides.override_summary: Transfer fees limited to franchisor's reasonable estimated or actual costs
overrides.why_it_matters: Then-current IFF as transfer fee may be challenged as exceeding actual costs
